figures.caption: Fig. 18–1.What is the magnetic field of a spherically symmetric current?
Fig. 18–2.The magnetic field near a charging capacitor.
Fig. 18–3.An infinite sheet of charge is suddenly set into motion parallel to itself. There are magnetic and electric fields that propagate out from the sheet at a constant speed.

Fig. 18–4.(a) The magnitude of B\FigB (or E\FigE) as a function of xx at time tt after the charge sheet is set in motion. (b) The fields for a charge sheet set in motion, toward negative yy at t=Tt=T. (c) The sum of (a) and (b).
